subcodes.first_line: O thou firm in the Covenant! Thy long letter was pursued. Some people's remarks are excessive and unworthy of response.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مفصل شما قرائت گردید صحبت های بعضی حشو و زواید است قابل
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @rejection, opposition and persecution
